REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $306.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100112465) AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, KEVIN
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-28-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-28-2020 CONTINUED TO DEC-22-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100112465) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ACHIEVABLE SOLUTIONS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBINSON, KEVIN $3,095.06 PRINCIPAL, $630.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,486.48 INTEREST, $306.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,517.54, SEE SCANNED DOC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-22-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
